sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92721" key="r(ou/dion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥούδιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κλύσμα πρὸς ῥοῦν γυναικεῖον</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg016:64" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.64</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
